email.title: DemandStar Email
email.description: Login email for DemandStar / OpenBids account.

password.title: DemandStar Password
password.description: Login password for DemandStar / OpenBids account.

disableGeographyFilter.title: Disable Gulf Coast filter
disableGeographyFilter.description: Default false = return ALL active FL + AL bids statewide (no geo filter). Set true to restrict output to Gulf Coast corridor keywords only (Pensacola → Tallahassee + Mobile AL). Note: despite the confusing name, true = Gulf Coast filter ON.
